/CAL:DEFT MOTION FOR RELEASE ON O,R,/MO DENIED/X:ASHLEY ODDO, CERTIFIED LAW STUDENT, APPEARED UNDER THE SUPERVISION OF DPD ON RECORD,/TEXT:TRANS TODEPT 16/TRANS 16:FORTHWITH FOR DISPO/
